sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    alt Success
        A->>B: OK
    else Failure
        A->>B: Error
    end
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
 +-----------+
 ||alt Success
 ||.........||
 ||         ||
 || OK      ||
 |+-------->||
 ||.........||
 ||Failure  ||
 ||         ||
 || Error   ||
 |+-------->||
 +-----------+
  |         |
